query:
INSERT INTO profile (
                id, backend, name, auth_method, created_at, last_used_at,
                provider,
                base_url_override,
                model_override,
                small_fast_model_override,
                default_opus_model_override,
                default_sonnet_model_override,
                default_haiku_model_override,
                subagent_model_override,
                family_override
            )
            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
